## Processed crop products


```{r}
#| label: processed crop production

# household df
process_crop_prod_hhold_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "process_crop_prod_hhold_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

# product df
process_crop_prod_product_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "process_crop_prod_product_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

tbls50x30::process_crop_prod(
  hhold_df = process_crop_prod_hhold_df,
  temp_crops_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$process_crop_prod_temp_crops_var),
  perm_crops_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$process_crop_prod_perm_crops_var),
  processed_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$process_crop_prod_processed_var),
  processed_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$process_crop_prod_processed_val),
  products_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$process_crop_prod_products_var),
  cases = cases_for_report,
  product_df =  process_crop_prod_product_df,
  # add funs
  sold_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$process_crop_prod_sold_var),
  sold_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$process_crop_prod_sold_val),
  amt_sold_vars = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$process_crop_prod_amt_sold_var[[1]]),
  amt_sold_dk_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$process_crop_prod_amt_sold_dk_val),
  group_var = "supervisor"
)
```
